title: Dumb Deaths
description: Everybody dies. But not everybody dies dumbly. This is Dumb Deaths.
quote: Yo man, is that a bear? I bet it totally wants to hug me.
altHero: hippie couple in the woods, the woman is pointing at something
alt1: hippie woman running toward a bear
alt2: hippie man leaning over dead woman putting his hand on her face
alt3: hippie man looking up at the sky
alt4: hippie man raising hands into the air
